name: Stamp Press
description: Industrial stamp pressing down with authoritative force

prompts.label: industrial stamp pressing down with authoritative mechanical force
prompts.text: industrial stamp pressing down with authoritative mechanical force, steam workshop furnace glow, brass gear clank on iron plate, forge-hot determination, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, with natural decay

prompts.label: heavy die press completing cycle with hydraulic thump
prompts.text: heavy die press completing cycle with hydraulic thump, Victorian clocktower, ratchet wrench click, oiled-machine rhythm, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, smooth fade out

prompts.label: manufacturing stamp leaving clean impression with solid impact
prompts.text: manufacturing stamp leaving clean impression with solid impact, locomotive engine room, tempered steel spring release, riveted iron solidity, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, crisp, sustained resonance

prompts.label: embossing press creating mark with precise tonnage
prompts.text: embossing press creating mark with precise tonnage, blacksmith anvil yard, cast iron lever thrown, pneumatic power hiss, 44.1kHz, stereo, high-quality, impactful, with natural decay

prompts.label: rubber seal meeting paper with decisive compression
